summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BIG Hat Presenter trivia tool new features: Clone functionality, color scheme, MC checkboxes, and cover image modes. All major features working correctly.
passed_tests: All backend API endpoints (19/19 tests passed)
New duplicate endpoint creates copy with '(Copy)' suffix
Dashboard colors correct: MC=Green, REG=Red, MISC=Blue, MYS=Purple, BIG=Yellow
Clone buttons visible and functional on all saved rounds
MC form uses checkboxes for correct answer selection
MC checkboxes show green highlighting when selected
MC form displays 'Answer: X)' badges correctly
Checkbox selection is exclusive (one per question)
MISC form shows cover image upload zone
REG form shows SharePoint link and note
MC/MYS/BIG forms show 'Default title card' notes
End-to-end MC round creation with checkboxes works
Cloned rounds preserve checkbox states and functionality
